name: @wxyc/concerts-poster-enrichment
description: WXYC nightly cron (BS#1743): enrich concert rows missing a poster (concerts.image_url IS NULL) with the resolved headliner's Discogs artist image via LML's getArtistDetails. Runs after the artist resolvers and the genre/similar-artists enrichment siblings; --backfill front-fills existing resolved unenriched headliners once (idempotent); cooperative pause defers when DJs are active. Depends on BS#1742 (preserve-on-null COALESCE) being deployed first.
